title: Duelity
description: Duelity is a simple Open Source duel plugin made for SMPs and as a base for upcoming Duel servers.
body: ## IMPORTANT! Plugin is WIP ![time](https://hackatime-badge.hackclub.com/U09C7CEA4JJ/Duelity?label=Duelity&color=orange) **Duelity is a Duel plugin made for HackClub Carnival, by Polokalap!** ## Commands: ### Admin: - `/#settings` - Set up the server (does literally nothing currently) - `/#arenas` - Add and manage arenas - `/#kits` - Add and manage kits ### Player: - `/duel` - Send a duel invitation to a player - `/editkit` - Edit a kit's - `/spectate` - ~~Stalk~~ Spectate other players - `/leave` - Leave from anything (duel, spectator etc.) # What is Duelity Duelity is a Duel plugin for Minecraft paper servers that lets people well... duel! I have made many duel plugins before, and they were all messy and most importantly, private. Many of my friends asked me to make them a custom one, but it would've taken too long and I would have got nothing in return, so there isn't much reason for me to do it. In December 2025, my friend told me about [HackClub Carnival](https://carnival.hackclub.com/), and I felt like I could do this, because so many people requested it and I would get some sort of reward here. The name came from the CS:2 skin, Duality because I was trying to think of a name and gave it this temporarily and didn't bother to change it. ## Here's a video featuring the plugin: ## How to set up a new arena ### Step 1 Type `/#arenas`, then click the **Add arena** button. ![img.png](https://github.com/Polokalap/Duelity/blob/master/Images/img.png?raw=true) ### Step 2 Paste the schematic of your map **or** build the map, then select the area using the arena wand. If you deleted it, you can get a new one by typing: ``` /#arenas wand give ``` ### Step 3 Set the team spawns by typing: ``` /#arenas set ``` Team colors are: - `blue` - `red` ### Step 4 Set the arena name and icon by typing: ``` /#arenas save ``` Then drop the arena’s icon as an item. --- ## How to set up a kit ### Step 1 Type `/#kits` to open the kit menu, then click the **Add kit** button. ![img_1.png](https://github.com/Polokalap/Duelity/blob/master/Images/img_1.png?raw=true) ### Step 2 Set the following variables by clicking the buttons in the menu: - Name - Icon - Items Then click **Next**. ![img_2.png](https://github.com/Polokalap/Duelity/blob/master/Images/img_2.png?raw=true) ### Step 3 Set the remaining variables: - Health - Gamemode - Maps Then click **Save kit**. ![img_3.png](https://github.com/Polokalap/Duelity/blob/master/Images/img_1.png?raw=true) ## Required plugins: - [FAWE](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fastasyncworldedit)
